name: vr-game-finder-netlify-backend
description: VR Game Finder with Netlify Functions, protected admin panel and shared catalog storage.

scripts.check:functions: node --check netlify/functions/games.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-login.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-logout.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-session.js && node --check netlify/functions/admin-games.js
